message:
feat(model): add source_repo to remaining test fixtures

Continue source_repo field addition by updating test fixtures in:
- src/cli/commands/stats.rs
- src/format/csv.rs
- src/format/output.rs
- src/format/rich.rs
- src/format/text.rs

This completes the test fixture updates for the source_repo field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
